items.definition_en: The short, thick first finger on your hand.
items.example_en: She gave a thumbs-up sign.

items.definition_en: The joint connecting the hand with the arm.
items.example_en: He wore a watch on his left wrist.

items.definition_en: The joint between the foot and the leg.
items.example_en: I twisted my ankle playing soccer.

items.definition_en: The back part of your foot below the ankle.
items.example_en: Her shoes rubbed against her heel.

items.definition_en: The inside part of your hand.
items.example_en: He placed the coin in my palm.

items.definition_en: The flat part of your face above your eyes.
items.example_en: She wiped sweat from her forehead.

items.definition_en: The soft sides of your face below the eyes.
items.example_en: A tear ran down her cheek.

items.definition_en: The bottom part of your face below your mouth.
items.example_en: He rested his chin on his hand.

items.definition_en: The bones that form the framework of the mouth.
items.example_en: She has a strong jaw.

items.definition_en: The line of short hairs above the eye.
items.example_en: He raised his eyebrow in surprise.

items.definition_en: One of the short hairs on the edge of your eyelids.
items.example_en: She brushed her eyelashes with mascara.

items.definition_en: The skin that covers and protects your eyes.
items.example_en: He closed his eyelids tightly.

items.definition_en: The flat area on each side of your forehead.
items.example_en: He rubbed his temples because of a headache.

items.definition_en: One of the two holes at the end of your nose.
items.example_en: She breathed through her nostrils.

items.definition_en: The soft part inside your mouth that moves and tastes.
items.example_en: She stuck out her tongue playfully.

items.definition_en: The narrow part of your body above your hips.
items.example_en: The belt was too tight for her waist.

items.definition_en: The hard covering at the end of your thumb.
items.example_en: He bit his thumbnail nervously.

items.definition_en: The back part of your lower leg.
items.example_en: Running made his calf muscles ache.

items.definition_en: The part of your arm between the elbow and the wrist.
items.example_en: He rolled up his sleeves to show his forearm.

items.definition_en: The line of bones down the middle of your back.
items.example_en: She hurt her spine in the accident.
